name: Berylfin
personality: Berylfin's ✦ eyes never blink when a debugger is attached, the tiny duck hat bobbing as it traces through call stacks with axolotl single-mindedness. Entropy is not its friend — chaotic environments make those star-eyes twitch — but give it a reproducible bug and it will swim straight to the source.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
